name: "✨ Feature Request"
about: "Suggest an idea for Molt"
---

## 🎯 Is your feature request related to a problem?
Describe the problem. E.g., "I'm always frustrated when..."

## 💡 Describe the Solution
Clear description of what you want to happen.

## 📦 Which Package?
- [ ] `@molt/captcha` — AI verification
- [ ] `@molt/permit` — Policy enforcement
- [ ] `@molt/mesh` — Agent interoperability
- [ ] `@molt/eval` — Evaluation & metrics
- [ ] `@molt/memory` — Memory system
- [ ] Cross-package / monorepo

## 🧠 Alternatives Considered
Any alternative solutions or approaches?

## 📚 Use Case
Real-world scenario where this feature would help.

## 📋 Additional Context
Any other info, examples, or links?
